global.description: The ad features a full canvas background with a prominent 'PixelForge' logo positioned at the top left. The main subject is highlighted by a central headline 'Level up today' and supporting body text 'Free rewards for new players' below it. A call-to-action button 'Get offer' is located at the bottom center. Decorative elements showcasing game graphics are strategically placed on the left and center, enhancing the visual appeal.
global.visual_style: Vibrant and engaging with a focus on game elements
global.main_message: Encouragement for new players to join and claim rewards

embedding_texts.global_text: Mobile ad for PixelForge Legends promoting rewards for new players.
